message:
fix(runtime): guard arena-indexed structures against TaskId slot reuse aliasing

Fix a class of correctness bugs where arena slot reuse (after a task
completes and its slot is recycled) could cause one task's state to
be confused with a different task that later occupies the same slot index.

deadline_monitor.rs:
- check_and_remove(): verify entry.task_id matches before marking violated
  and before clearing the monitored slot — prevents a recycled slot's
  deadline from being attributed to the wrong task
- register path: clear stale entry if slot is occupied by a different task_id
  before inserting new monitor entry

local.rs (LocalTaskStore):
- remove(): verify the slot's task_id matches before taking the entry,
  preventing removal of a different task that recycled the same slot
- Uses new LocalStoredTask::task_id() getter

obligation_table.rs (ObligationTable):
- by_holder index changed from Vec<Option<SmallVec<[ObligationId; 4]>>> to
  Vec<Option<(TaskId, SmallVec<[ObligationId; 4]>)>> — each slot now tracks
  which TaskId owns it
- register_holder(): if slot is occupied by a different task, clear existing
  obligations before inserting new ones
- remove_by_index(): only modify holder index if holder matches stored TaskId
- ids_for_holder(): only return obligations if slot's TaskId matches query

stored_task.rs:
- Add task_id() getter on LocalStoredTask to support the local.rs guard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
